name: Ross
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 223; Episode 146

Ross is a member of the Bellamy Pirates. He is a fighter, and wears a similar attire to Braham from Skypiea. He is the one who smashes Luffy's head against a window, breaking it in the process. His full face, beyond a chin, is hidden by his hat in all appearances.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
